findings.description: PascalCase class names `SqlPStatement` and `SqlResultSet` appear in the Java code example in s5 but are absent from s5 hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source Java code: `SqlPStatement prepared = connection.prepareStatement(query);` and `SqlResultSet resultSet = new SimpleDbTransactionExecutor<SqlResultSet>(...)`

findings.description: The closing comment inside the Java code block explaining that `doTransaction()` invokes the `execute` method as a callback is omitted. This comment conveys the callback mechanism of the framework pattern.
findings.source_evidence: Source code comment before `}.doTransaction();`: 「// SimpleDbTransactionExecutorを実装したクラスのdoTransactionを実行する。\n// これにより、上記で説明したexecuteメソッドがコールバックされSQL文を簡易的に実行することが可能となる。」
